scripts.serve: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "auth,job-search,budget,tracer" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,magenta" "cd ../backend/go-auth && go run ./cmd/server" "cd ../backend/go-job-search && go run ./cmd/server" "cd ../backend/go-budget && go run ./cmd/server" "cd ../backend/go-tracer && go run ./cmd/server"
